title: phlomis × composita var. almijarensis
intro: Phlomis × composita var. almijarensis is a hybrid plant species within the Lamiaceae family, often referred to as a variety of Jerusalem sage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. This plant has been associated with various health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Phlomis × composita var. almijarensis are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are taken to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
